offer: For construction contractors managing 5–15 projects simultaneously, inefficient tracking of equipment usage causes underutilization. We provide utilization reports instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: inefficient tracking of equipment usage leading to underutilization
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to contractors with demo video
try_it: Let users try manual entry and basic reporting on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
